name: Mexican Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook, stirring constantly for 10 minutes.
3. Serve over pound cake or ice cream.
4. To store, pour into a jar and cover.
5. The sauce will keep in the refrigerator up to 3 months.
6. To warm, place the jar in a pan of hot water over low heat.
